TestWithTransformc

            y = z ** 3
        ax
        $0_0 = x
        $0_2 = $0_0.__exit__
        $0_0.__enter__()
        $0_1 = True
        try:
            try:
                $1_0 = None
                y = z ** 3
            except:
                $0_1 = False
                if (not $0_2($1_0)):
                    raise
        finally:
            if $0_1:
                $0_2(None, None, None)

        $0_2 = $0_0.__exit__
        $0_3 = $0_0.__enter__()

                $1_0 = None
